# Buildwise Media — Full Reference

> AI-powered marketing agency for service businesses.

## About
Buildwise Media builds AI-powered Revenue Engines for service businesses. We handle strategy, website, content production, paid ads, AI business tools, and analytics — so business owners can focus on running their business, not their marketing.

We are an AI-native agency. AI is built into every deliverable we produce — not a buzzword on our homepage.

## Services

### Ascend — Full-Service AI Marketing
Done-for-you marketing engine. Website, content, ads, AI tools, strategy, analytics.
Price: $5,999/month. Month-to-month. No long-term contracts.
Engine Build fee at signing. Ad spend separate.

#### Ascend Deliverables

1. **Custom Website** — Your 24/7 salesperson. PageSpeed 90+, SEO-optimized, conversion-engineered. Custom-built code you own. Not a template on someone else's platform.

2. **Content Production** — Social media content, video, graphics — produced, scheduled, and published. You approve what goes out, we handle the rest. Your time commitment: about 30 minutes per month.

3. **Paid Ads** — Meta + Google ads managed against real revenue targets, not vanity metrics. Ad creative, targeting, optimization — all handled.

4. **AI Business Tools** — Chatbot, AI phone system, appointment booking, review management — all configured for your business. These tools work 24/7 so you don't have to.

5. **Strategy & Analytics** — Monthly performance reviews. GA4 dashboard. Data-driven adjustments. You always know what's working and what's next.

6. **Brand Identity** — Professional brand voice, visual identity, and messaging framework you own forever. No hostage situations.

### Ascend Lite — Lead Generation Foundation
Sales funnel, paid ads management, strategy, analytics, brand foundation.
Price: $3,500/month. Month-to-month. No long-term contracts.

#### Ascend Lite Deliverables

1. **Sales Funnel** — High-converting landing page designed to turn visitors into booked calls.
2. **Paid Ads Management** — Meta + Google ad campaigns managed against real business outcomes.
3. **Strategy** — Marketing strategy and positioning for your niche.
4. **Analytics** — Performance tracking and monthly reviews.
5. **Brand Foundation** — Core messaging, visual direction, and brand voice.

---

## The Poor Four — The 4 Problems Every Service Business Faces

### 1. Lead Droughts
Referrals dry up. You have no predictable pipeline. Revenue swings month to month with no way to control it.

### 2. Owner Trap
You're stuck doing everything yourself. Marketing becomes another job on top of the job you already have. You can't step away without everything stopping.

### 3. Manual Mayhem
Posting, scheduling, following up — everything is manual and nothing scales. You're doing the work of 3 people and still falling behind.

### 4. Reactive Mode
No plan, no data, no direction. You're always putting out fires instead of building toward something. Every decision is a guess.

---

## How It Works — 3 Phases

### Phase 1: Discovery
We learn your business in 48 hours. Not 48 meetings. We study your market, your competitors, your customers, and your goals. This phase produces your strategy, brand positioning, and build plan.

### Phase 2: Build
Your complete marketing engine — website, content, ads, AI tools — built in weeks. Everything is built to engineering standards, tested, and deployed. You own every asset from day one.

### Phase 3: Run
The engine fills your pipeline. You answer the phone. We manage, optimize, and improve every channel continuously. Monthly performance reviews keep everything on track.

### The 12-Stage Pipeline (Internal)
1. Success Survey — gather business data and goals
2. Marketing Strategy — positioning, audience, competitive analysis
3. Breakthrough Offer — craft your irresistible offer
4. One Core Concept — distill your brand to its essence
5. Content Brief — section-by-section copy direction
6. Brand Visual Context — palette, typography, imagery
7. Niche Design Brief — industry-specific design patterns
8. Website Build — custom-coded, conversion-engineered
9. Content Production — social, video, graphics pipeline
10. Paid Ads Launch — Meta + Google campaigns
11. AI Tools Setup — chatbot, phone system, booking
12. Analytics + Optimization — ongoing performance management

---

## Company Values

### GSD (Get Stuff Done)
We ship. No endless planning cycles, no death by committee. If it can be done today, it gets done today.

### Integrity
We say what we mean and do what we say. No bait-and-switch. No hidden fees. No phantom deliverables. Month-to-month because we're confident in results.

### Excellence
Every deliverable meets an 8/10 quality threshold before it ships. We don't send "good enough" work. 71 internal processes ensure consistency across every client.

### Add the Light
Business is hard enough. We bring positive energy, clear communication, and genuine partnership to every interaction.

---

## Engineering Standards

- **PageSpeed:** 90+ on every website we build
- **Internal Processes:** 71 documented processes across the pipeline
- **Quality Threshold:** 8/10 minimum on every deliverable before shipping
- **Schema Types:** 6 JSON-LD schema types per site (LocalBusiness, Organization, Service, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, HowTo)
- **Readability:** Flesch-Kincaid 5th-7th grade on all client-facing copy
- **Core Web Vitals:** LCP <2.5s, FID <100ms, CLS <0.1
- **Page Weight:** <500KB per page
- **AI-Native Production:** AI handles 85% of content production

---

## Buildwise Media vs. Typical Agency

| Dimension | Typical Agency | Buildwise Media |
|-----------|---------------|-----------------|
| Contract | 6-12 month lock-in | Month-to-month |
| Ownership | They own your website & assets | You own everything |
| Your Time | Hours of meetings weekly | 30 minutes per month |
| Reporting | Vanity metrics PDF | GA4 dashboard + revenue tracking |
| AI | Buzzword on their website | Built into every deliverable |
| Website | Template on their platform | Custom-built, you own the code |

---

## FAQ

### What types of businesses do you work with?
We work with service businesses — contractors, agencies, consultants, and professional service providers who have a proven service and happy customers but need a system to consistently attract more of the right clients.

### How is this different from other marketing agencies?
Most agencies sell deliverables and lock you into long contracts. We build infrastructure you own, run it with AI-powered automation, and work month-to-month because we're confident in the results.

### What does "you own everything" actually mean?
Your website is on your domain. Your ad accounts are in your name. Your content, your brand assets, your data — all yours. If you leave, you take everything with you. No hostage situations.

### How long until I see results?
Most clients see their first qualified leads within 30 days of engine launch. Pipeline consistency typically establishes within 60-90 days as all channels reach optimization.

### What if I want to cancel?
Cancel anytime. No penalties. No contracts. You keep everything we built. We believe if we're doing our job, you won't want to leave.

### What's included in Ascend?
Ascend includes a custom website, content production, paid ads management, AI business tools, strategy and analytics, and brand identity. It's everything you need to generate, convert, and retain customers — all managed for you.

### How long does it take to launch?
Your marketing engine launches within 30 days. We move fast because our AI-powered production process eliminates the bottlenecks that slow traditional agencies down.

### Do I need to provide content or ideas?
No. We handle all content creation, from strategy to production to publishing. You approve what goes out, and we handle the rest. Your time commitment is about 30 minutes per month.

### How do you measure results?
We track real business metrics — leads, booked calls, cost per acquisition, and revenue impact. You get a GA4 dashboard and monthly performance reviews so you always know what's working.
